scripts.test:all: npm run test:backend && npm run test:mobile
scripts.start:all: docker-compose up -d && powershell -Command "Start-Sleep -s 5; Start-Process http://localhost:3000; Start-Process http://localhost:3000/api-docs; Start-Process http://localhost:3000/health; Write-Host 'Levantando todo... El APK se generará en mobile/build/'"
